description_long: This is a ceiling-mounted electric fan with five elongated, flat blades radiating from a central cylindrical motor housing. The blades are a dark brown color, likely made of wood or a wood-like composite, and are evenly spaced around the central hub. The motor housing is metallic, with a slightly domed top and a short downrod connecting it to a mounting canopy. The overall design is modern and functional, with no visible blade guard or decorative elements. The fan appears robust and suitable for large indoor spaces such as living rooms, offices, or commercial areas. There are no visible controls or power cords, indicating that it may be operated by a wall switch or remote control.
description: A ceiling-mounted electric fan with five dark brown blades and a metallic central housing, featuring a modern, minimalist design. No visible controls or blade guard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the fan from a slightly angled perspective, highlighting the even spacing and length of the five blades.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the fan from another angle, emphasizing the flatness and width of the blades as well as the central hub.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a clear look at the symmetry of the blades and the cylindrical motor housing.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the fan from a different side, showing the mounting rod and canopy more prominently.
attribute_blade_guard_design: There is no visible blade guard; the blades are fully exposed and attached directly to the central hub.
